targets.failure_summary: GatedPolicy gated_score_bias stays near zero (TV 0.0001-0.0006) throughout all of P1 training across all 3 seeds on ARM_2 and ARM_3. Both substrate fixes (FIX 1: one-hot augmentation; FIX 2: dacc_weight=1.0) confirmed landed via pre-flight assertions. Inert gating caused by training signal gap: P1 diversification loss (head_div + disc_var) is self-supervised with no outcome-coupled gradient.

four_layer_diagnosis.claim_alignment: unclear -- gated heads had correct input but no outcome signal; ARC-062 never expressed itself
four_layer_diagnosis.biological_reference: partial -- architecture matches PFC/BG gating anatomy; reward-dependent plasticity analog (dopamine-equivalent outcome coupling) absent from training
four_layer_diagnosis.prerequisites: missing -- outcome-coupled credit assignment for candidate selection
four_layer_diagnosis.implementation: partial -- heads built + input correct (one-hot fix working), P1 training procedure decoupled from outcomes
four_layer_diagnosis.environment: adequate -- SD-054 carries discriminative signal; C3 hint (ARM_3 forage_hazard_rate 0.325 vs 0.619) confirms environment is capable
four_layer_diagnosis.measurement: adequate -- TV probe correctly detects inert gating; C2/C4 confirm residual state-dependent variation
four_layer_diagnosis.integration: isolated -- gated policy trained via diversity loss only; not wired to candidate-outcome returns
four_layer_diagnosis.scale: unknown -- irrelevant until training signal is fixed

biological_reference.closest_mechanism: Lateral PFC rule-coding units (Bongard & Nieder 2010 PNAS: abstract rule cells; Miller & Cohen 2001: sustained PFC bias of posterior regions)
dependencies: Reward-dependent abstraction pressure (task contingencies that make abstract rule application rewardable)
Dopaminergic outcome coupling (plasticity conditioned on whether the correct rule was applied)
biological_reference.divergence: PFC rule-coding units emerge under reward-dependent task pressure, not diversity regularization. The diversification loss achieves head separation without behavioral divergence when discriminator w ~ 0.5.
biological_reference.lit_anticipation: SYNTHESIS.md explicitly noted: 'ARC-062 may need an explicit rule-discrimination loss on the encoder rather than relying on policy-loss back-propagation alone.' No new lit-pull needed.

manifest_evidence_direction_correction.rationale: ARC-062 was never tested under conditions where it could express itself (no outcome-coupled training signal). The architecture is not implicated by inert gating caused by a diversity-only loss.

targets.recommended_evidence_quality_note: V3-EXQ-543f (2026-05-17): reclassified non_contributory (confirmed user-gated; see failure_autopsy_EXQ-543f_2026-05-17). Both substrate fixes from 543e autopsy landed (pre-flight assertions confirmed: one-hot augmentation active, dacc_weight=1.0). Inert gating (TV 0.0001-0.0006 across all seeds, threshold 0.05) caused by training signal gap: P1 diversification loss (head_div + disc_var) is self-supervised with no outcome-coupled gradient. The composed gated_score_bias = w*head_0 + (1-w)*head_1 stays near zero when discriminator w ~ 0.5, even when heads diverge, because symmetric head divergence cancels in the composition. Architecture untested in confound-free conditions. No confidence change. No conflict-ratio movement. Routing: V3-EXQ-543g with outcome-coupled P1 loss (advantage-weighted candidate supervision or policy gradient on GatedPolicy parameters).
learning_extracted: P1 diversification loss (head_div + disc_var) conflates head-level diversity with behavioral diversity: composed bias can be zero even when head_0 and head_1 are maximally divergent, if discriminator w ~ 0.5.
FIX 1 (one-hot augmentation) and FIX 2 (dacc_weight=1.0) both confirmed working by pre-flight assertions; substrate is no longer the bottleneck.

C2/C4 passing with dACC active (ARM_3): state-dependent behavioral variation exists in the substrate + environment; likely dACC-driven but confirms an outcome-coupled GatedPolicy would have real signal to train on.

C3 hint (ARM_3 forage_hazard_rate 0.325 vs ARM_0 0.619, 47.5% reduction): environment carries discriminative behavioral signal; probe gate failure means this cannot count as evidence but it is encouraging.
Biological parallel: Bongard & Nieder 2010 rule-cell representations emerge under reward-contingent abstraction pressure, not diversity regularization.

routing_details.scientific_question: unchanged -- can a two-head gated architecture with learned context discriminator break monomodal collapse on SD-054 substrate?
routing_details.structural_changes: Same 2x2 factorial (ARM_0-ARM_3), same SD-054 substrate, same P0/P1/P2 phased structure. Redesign P1 loss: replace diversity regularizer with outcome-coupled credit assignment (advantage-weighted candidate supervision or policy gradient on GatedPolicy parameters). Recommended: store (probe_state, candidate_selected_index, episode_return) during P1; advantage-weighted CE loss; keep disc_var as secondary regularizer with reduced lambda; remove head_div_term.
routing_details.acceptance_criteria: unchanged from 543c/543e pre-registration: D2 AND D3 for PASS

positive_signals_for_follow_on: C2 PASS (ARM_3 mean_abs_rho=0.205): state-dependent variation exists with dACC active
C4 PASS (ARM_3 CoV=0.708): high cross-seed behavioral diversity with full substrate
C3 hint: ARM_3 forage_hazard_rate 0.325 vs ARM_0 0.619 (47.5% relative delta)
